memory.name: Memory
memory.description: Flip cards to find matching pairs. The player with the most pairs wins.
memory.how_to_play:
Cards are laid face-down in a 4×4 grid. Players take turns.
On your turn, flip any two face-down cards one at a time.
If the two cards match, they stay face-up and you take another turn.
If they don't match, both flip back face-down and the other player goes.
The player who collects the most matching pairs wins.
